user.title: Set up VK Notify
user.description:
Enter your VK community bot token.

[Documentation]({docs_url})

data_description.access_token: VK community bot token with Messages permission
data_description.name: Friendly name for this notification entity

select_mode.title: Connection mode
select_mode.description: Choose how the integration connects to VK.

select_chat.title: Select chat
select_chat.description:
Select the chat to send notifications to.

If the desired chat is not in the list, the recipient must first send a message to the community.

reconfigure.title: Change chat
reconfigure.description: Select a new chat to send notifications to.

error.invalid_token: Invalid access token or API error. Please check your token.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to VK API.
error.no_conversations: No conversations found. Make sure the bot has at least one conversation.
error.group_id_required: Could not detect community ID from the token. Make sure the token belongs to a community.
error.longpoll_no_access: The token does not have permission to use Long Poll. Re-generate the community token with 'Community management' permission enabled.
error.chat_not_writable: The bot cannot send messages to this chat. Select a different chat.

abort.already_configured: This VK Notify instance is already configured.

options.longpoll: Long Poll — send and receive incoming messages as HA events

wall_post.name: Post to wall
wall_post.description: Publish a post on the VK community wall. Returns post_id.

file.name: Local file path
file.description: Local path to a document to attach.

parse_mode.name: Parse Mode
parse_mode.description: Message text parser. Choose 'Plain text' to send raw text without formatting.

disable_mentions.name: Silent mentions
disable_mentions.description: Disables only the specific mention push (@id). Note: The standard new message notification will still arrive unless the chat is muted.

payload.name: Hidden data (Payload)
payload.description: Invisible data string returned to the bot upon reply or forward.

keyboard.name: Keyboard
keyboard.description: JSON object for inline or regular keyboard.

reply_to.name: Reply to message
reply_to.description: Message ID (cmid) in the chat to reply to.

parse_mode.name: Parse Mode
parse_mode.description: Message text parser. Choose 'Plain text' to send raw text without formatting.

disable_mentions.name: Silent mentions
disable_mentions.description: Disables only the specific mention push (@id). Note: The standard new message notification will still arrive unless the chat is muted.

payload.name: Hidden data (Payload)
payload.description: Invisible data string returned to the bot upon reply or forward.

keyboard.name: Keyboard
keyboard.description: JSON object for inline or regular keyboard.

reply_to.name: Reply to message
reply_to.description: Message ID (cmid) in the chat to reply to.

send_message.name: Send message
send_message.description: Sends a text notification, media, coordinates, or carousel.

title.name: Title
title.description: Optional title. Added as the first line before the message with a double line break.

message.name: Message
message.description: Main notification text. Supports emojis and line breaks.

parse_mode.name: Parse Mode
parse_mode.description: Message text parser. Choose 'Plain text' to send raw text without formatting.

attachment.name: Attachment (Media)
attachment.description: Ready-made media string from VK, e.g., photo123_456 or doc-789_012.

disable_mentions.name: Silent mentions
disable_mentions.description: Disables only the specific mention push (@id). Note: The standard new message notification will still arrive unless the chat is muted.

keyboard.name: Keyboard
keyboard.description: JSON object for inline or regular keyboard.

template.name: Template / Carousel
template.description: JSON object for the carousel. Per VK API requirements, it must contain 'type': 'carousel' and an 'elements' array (max 10 items).

payload.name: Hidden data (Payload)
payload.description: Invisible data string returned to the bot upon reply or forward.

reply_to.name: Reply to message
reply_to.description: Message ID (cmid) in the chat to reply to.

edit_message.name: Edit message
edit_message.description: Edits the text, keyboard, and attachments of a previously sent message.

parse_mode.name: Parse Mode
parse_mode.description: Message text parser. Choose 'Plain text' to send raw text without formatting.

attachment.name: New attachment
attachment.description: Media string (photo123_456). Pass an empty string to remove the attachment.

disable_mentions.name: Silent mentions
disable_mentions.description: Disables only the specific mention push (@id). Note: The standard new message notification will still arrive unless the chat is muted.

delete_message.name: Delete message
delete_message.description: Deletes a message for all chat participants.

set_activity.name: Set activity status
set_activity.description: Shows typing or recording audio status in the chat.

send_reaction.name: Send reaction
send_reaction.description: Sets an emoji reaction to a specific message.

conversation_message_id.name: Conversation Message ID
conversation_message_id.description: Message ID in the chat to react to.

pin_message.name: Pin message
pin_message.description: Pins the specified message in the chat.

unpin_message.name: Unpin message
unpin_message.description: Unpins a message in the chat. If no ID is provided, unpins the currently pinned message.

conversation_message_id.name: Conversation Message ID
conversation_message_id.description: Message ID within the chat (cmid). If empty, unpins the last pinned message.

answer_callback.name: Answer Callback (Snackbar)
answer_callback.description: Stops the loading spinner on an inline button and optionally shows a snackbar notification.

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: VK ID of the user who clicked the button (from trigger.event.data.user_id).

message.name: Message (Snackbar)
message.description: Text to display in the snackbar (max 90 chars). If empty, the button just stops spinning.

send_voice.name: Send voice message
send_voice.description: Sends an audio file (.ogg) as a native voice message.

file.name: Local audio path
file.description: Local path to the .ogg file on the HA server.

message.name: Text
message.description: Text to be sent alongside the audio.

parse_mode.name: Parse Mode
parse_mode.description: Message text parser. Choose 'Plain text' to send raw text without formatting.

disable_mentions.name: Silent mentions
disable_mentions.description: Disables only the specific mention push (@id). Note: The standard new message notification will still arrive unless the chat is muted.

payload.name: Hidden data (Payload)
payload.description: Invisible data string returned to the bot upon reply or forward.

keyboard.name: Keyboard
keyboard.description: JSON object for inline or regular keyboard.

reply_to.name: Reply to message
reply_to.description: Message ID (cmid) in the chat to reply to.

edit_chat.name: Edit chat title
edit_chat.description: Changes the title of a group chat (Bot must be an admin!).

get_user_info.name: Get user info
get_user_info.description: Requests user data. Returns First Name, Last Name, and Online status.

user_id.name: VK User ID
user_id.description: Numeric User ID (or from_id from an event).

send_sticker.name: Send sticker
send_sticker.description: Sends a VK sticker by its internal ID.

sticker_id.name: Sticker ID
sticker_id.description: Sequence number of the sticker (e.g., 3 for Spotty dog).

reply_to.name: Reply to message
reply_to.description: Message ID (cmid) in the chat to reply to.
